message:
GSD — Get Shit Done

QUICK START
  /gsd start <tpl>   Start a workflow template
  /gsd               Open the state-aware home menu
  /gsd auto          Run all queued units continuously
  /gsd pause         Pause auto-mode
  /gsd stop          Stop auto-mode gracefully

VISIBILITY
  /gsd status         Interactive 10-tab TUI  (Ctrl+Alt+G / Ctrl+Shift+G)
  /gsd parallel watch Parallel monitor  (Ctrl+Alt+P)
  /gsd notifications  Notification history  (Ctrl+Alt+N / Ctrl+Shift+N)
  /gsd visualize  …
